content: We can frame the vanilla Self-Refine framework as a single-perspective self-reflection mechanism, and hypothesize that integrating multiple inconsistent self-solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection research into Self-Refine's iterative loop will boost output quality without adding external supervision or training overhead. This creates a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that fixes the key blind spot of vanilla Self-Refine's single-loop feedback.
